description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-accordion

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-accordion/`
**Sub-components:** hx-accordion-item (lives in same directory)

### Audit Scope (ALL areas — leave nothing unchecked)

1. **Design Tokens** — Verify ALL CSS custom properties use `--hx-` prefixed tokens. No hardcoded colors, spacing, typography, or timing values. Check three-tier cascade (primitive → semantic → component). Verify dark mode token overrides work.

2. **Accessibility (A11Y)** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Verify ARIA roles, states, properties. Keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Space, Home, End). Focus management and focus-ring visibility. Screen reader announcements. Reduced-motion support.

3. **Functionality** — Test all public properties, methods, events. Edge cases (empty state, overflow, rapid toggling). Slot behavior (default + named slots). Reactive property updates. Event bubbling/composition through Shadow DOM.

4. **TypeScript** — Strict mode compliance. No `any` types. Proper type exports. ElementInternals usage if form-associated. Decorator usage (@customElement, @property, @state, @query).

5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM encapsulation verified. CSS Parts exposed and documented. No style leakage. Responsive behavior. CSS containment where appropriate. Host styles properly scoped.

6. **CEM Accuracy** — Custom Elements Manifest matches actual public API. All properties, events, slots, CSS parts, CSS custom properties documented with descriptions. Run `npm run cem` and diff.

7. **Tests** — Test file exists and covers: rendering, property reflection, event emission, keyboard interaction, accessibility (aXe), slot projection, edge cases. Coverage target 80%+.

8. **Storybook** — Stories exist for all variants. Controls wired to all public properties. Autodocs working from CEM. Visual regression baseline exists.

9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Component works in Twig templates without modification. No JavaScript framework dependencies. Progressive enhancement friendly. Server-side rendering considerations.

10. **Portability** — Works without build tools (CDN usage). No external dependencies beyond Lit. Lazy-loadable. Tree-shakeable.

11. **wc-mcp Health Score** — No baseline score available yet. Target: 100 (A). Document all issues found.

### Deliverable
Create a detailed markdown report as a comment in the PR documenting ALL findings across every category. Categorize issues as: CRITICAL (blocks release), HIGH (must fix), MEDIUM (should fix), LOW (nice to have). Fix any CRITICAL or HIGH issues directly. For MEDIUM/LOW, document them clearly for follow-up tickets.

### Files to examine
- `hx-accordion.ts` — main component
- `hx-accordion.styles.ts` — styles
- `hx-accordion.test.ts` — tests
- `hx-accordion.stories.ts` — stories
- `index.ts` — re-exports
- Any sub-component files (hx-accordion-item)
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-accordion
